testsuite.name: grabflow.notification.TemplateRendererTest
testsuite.system-out: 19:41:45.795 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=RIDE_MATCHED result='Great news! Driver {{driverName}} ({{vehicleModel}}) has been matched to your ride.' 19:41:45.797 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=DRIVER_ARRIVING result='Your driver {{driverName}} is arriving in {{eta}} minutes. Look for {{vehicleModel}} ({{licensePlate}}).' 19:41:45.798 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=RIDE_STARTED result='Your ride has started. Estimated arrival at {{destination}} in {{eta}} minutes.' 19:41:45.798 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=RIDE_COMPLETED result='You have arrived at {{destination}}. Hope you enjoyed the ride!' 19:41:45.799 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=PAYMENT_RECEIPT result='Payment of {{amount}} {{currency}} for your ride on {{date}} has been processed. Ref: {{referenceId}}.' 19:41:45.800 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=SURGE_ALERT result='Surge pricing is active in your area. Current multiplier: {{multiplier}}x. Fares will return to normal soon.' 19:41:45.801 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Template registered for type=RIDE_MATCHED 19:41:45.801 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=RIDE_MATCHED result='Driver {{driverName}} matched' 19:41:45.802 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Template registered for type=RIDE_STARTED 19:41:45.802 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=RIDE_STARTED result='Custom: hello' 19:41:45.802 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Template registered for type=DRIVER_ARRIVING 19:41:45.802 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=DRIVER_ARRIVING result='Driver Ali arrives in 5 min' 19:41:45.803 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Template registered for type=SURGE_ALERT 19:41:45.803 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=SURGE_ALERT result='Surge 2.5x active in {{area}}' 19:41:45.803 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Template registered for type=RIDE_COMPLETED 19:41:45.803 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=RIDE_COMPLETED result='Your ride is complete.' 19:41:45.804 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Template registered for type=RIDE_COMPLETED 19:41:45.804 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.notification.TemplateRenderer -- Rendered template type=RIDE_COMPLETED result='Arrived at Airport. Fare: 12.50 USD.'
